dublinCore.dc:title: 119 HR 7710 IH: Defense Community Infrastructure Program Tribal Eligibility Act of 2026
dublinCore.dc:rights: Pursuant to Title 17 Section 105 of the United States Code, this file is not subject to copyright protection and is in the public domain.

action.action-desc: Ms. Randall (for herself and Mr. Wittman) introduced the following bill; which was referred to the Committee on Armed Services

form.official-title: To amend title 10, United States Code, to include Indian tribes in the defense community infrastructure program, and for other purposes.

section.text: This Act may be cited as the Defense Community Infrastructure Program Tribal Eligibility Act of 2026.

section.header: Including Tribal governments in the defense community infrastructure program
section.text: Section 2391 of title 10, United States Code, is amended—

subparagraph.text: in paragraph (1)(A), by inserting Indian tribes, after local governments,; and
in paragraph (2)(B), by striking or local government each place such term appears and inserting government, local government, or Indian tribe; and
in paragraph (4)(A)(ii)(I), by striking or local government and inserting government, local government, or Indian tribe; and
by adding at the end the following new paragraph:

paragraph.text: The term Indian tribe has the meaning given that term in section 4 of the Indian Self-Determination and Education Assistance Act (25 U.S.C. 5304).
